summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitMaster Exercise Library functionality. Backend APIs work perfectly (8/8 tests passed), but frontend Exercise Library page is not accessible due to routing issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Exercise Library page at /exercise-library redirects to /dashboard, making the functionality inaccessible to users
Exercicios navigation link in sidebar is not clickable or has timeout issues

integration_issues.issue: Users cannot access the Exercise Library UI despite backend APIs working perfectly

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Exercise Library page routing issue. The ExerciseLibraryPage.jsx component exists but is not accessible at /exercise-library URL (redirects to dashboard). Need to check React Router configuration and ensure proper routing setup for exercise library functionality.

success_percentage.frontend: 20% (login works, but main Exercise Library functionality inaccessible)
